pages.title: About - Andy McDonald MP
pages.text_excerpt: About - Andy McDonald MP Skip to main content Andy McDonald MP Middlesbrough and Thornaby East Home About Contact Us Surgeries Latest Newsletter More Search Search the website Search Menu About Welcome to my website. Please feel free to take a look at my blog page with articles on issues I have taken up. Also on this site are my recent press releases on local and national issues. If you have a query or an issue you would like to raise with me please complete the contact form on the website or call my office on 01642 246574 and we will do our best to help you. Andy McDonald MP Andy McDonald MP Contact details Fry St, Middlesbrough TS1 1HA, UK View on Google Maps Email: andy.mcdonald.2nd@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Lewis Young at Transport House, Fry Street, Middlesbrough. pages.title: Surgeries - Andy McDonald MP
headings: h3: My next surgery for Middlesbrough & Thornaby East constituents will be announced soon.
h2: To contact the office, please email andy.mcdonald.2nd@parliament.uk or if you are unable to email
pages.text_excerpt: Surgeries - Andy McDonald MP Skip to main content Andy McDonald MP Middlesbrough and Thornaby East Home About Contact Us Surgeries Latest Newsletter More Search Search the website Search Menu Surgeries My next surgery for Middlesbrough & Thornaby East constituents will be announced soon. It is essential to book an appointment in advance via the contact details below. Attendance is by appointment only with 15 minute slots available. Also note that I have a fully staffed office and it is very likely they can help you with an enquiry or problem, so please ask to speak to a member of staff initially. To contact the office, please email andy.mcdonald.2nd@parliament.uk or if you are unable to email call 01642 246574. Thank you! I am the Member of Parliament for Middlesbrough. Welcome to my website. Please feel free to browse my blog articles on local and national issues and if you have an urgent query or an issue you would like to raise with me please complete one of the online forms and my staff and I will do whatever we can to help you. You can also call my Constituency Office between 9am and 5pm on 01642 246574 and raise an issue with me there. Andy McDonald MP Andy McDonald MP Contact details Fry St, Middlesbrough TS1 1HA, UK View on Google Maps Email: andy.mcdonald.2nd@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Lewis Young at Transport House, Fry Street, Middlesbrough.
